allow: Bash(git -c credential.interactive=never -c core.askpass= push -u origin main)

Bash(node -e "process.env.PORT=4123; require\('./server.js'\); setTimeout\(async\(\)=>{const r=await fetch\('http://localhost:4123/dashboard.html'\);const t=await r.text\(\);console.log\('STATUS',r.status\);console.log\('has library:', t.includes\('id=\\"libraryBox\\"'\)\);console.log\('has playlist-list:', t.includes\('playlist-list'\)\);console.log\('has addsel:', t.includes\('addsel'\)\);process.exit\(0\);},800\);")

Bash(node -e "process.env.PORT=4124; require\('./server.js'\); setTimeout\(async\(\)=>{const r=await fetch\('http://localhost:4124/dashboard.html'\);const t=await r.text\(\);console.log\('STATUS',r.status\);console.log\('has pl-dup btn:', t.includes\('pl-dup'\)\);console.log\('has dup handler:', t.includes\('Duplicar \(insertar'\) || t.includes\('classList.contains\(\\'pl-dup\\'\)'\)\);process.exit\(0\);},800\);")
